backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining types (Ingredient, Recipe, Customer, Subscription, SalesInvoice) and implementing CRUD operations with session-based authentication, inventory management, and sales tracking functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-7+) to implementation files, primarily focusing on SalesPage.tsx and InvoiceForm.tsx for invoice creation, customer management, and recipe selection features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including pages (Dashboard, Inventory, Menu, Sales, Subscriptions, Customers), forms, lists, authentication context, React Query hooks, and utility functions for the Salad Khatora application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS variables for light and dark themes, including primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Salad Khatora application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for login, dashboard, inventory, menu, sales, subscriptions, and customers, wrapped in QueryClient, AuthProvider, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CustomerDetailsD: Dialog component displaying comprehensive customer information including contact details, purchase history, order statistics, and invoice list with recipe details and edit functionality.
frontend/src/components/CustomerForm.tsx: React form component for adding/editing customers using react-hook-form, with fields for name, mobile, email, reference source, preferences, and address. Serializes contact info as JSON and uses mutation hooks to save customer data.
frontend/src/components/CustomerList.tsx: Displays a grid of customer cards with contact info, activity status, and order statistics (total orders and spent). Clicking a card opens details dialog; includes edit button for each customer.
frontend/src/components/IngredientForm.t: React form for adding/editing ingredients with fields for name, quantity, unit (grams/kilograms), cost price, supplier, and low stock threshold. Uses react-hook-form and mutation hooks to persist ingredient data.
frontend/src/components/IngredientList.t: Displays ingredients in a grid of cards showing quantity, cost price, supplier, and threshold. Highlights low-stock items with a warning badge and border.
frontend/src/components/InventoryAdjustm: Shows chronological history of all inventory adjustments across ingredients, fetching data from backend actor. Displays adjustment type (addition/deduction), quantity, reason, and links to related invoices.
frontend/src/components/InvoiceDetailsDi: Modal dialog displaying full invoice details including customer info, ordered items with recipes and bowl sizes, payment method, and total amount breakdown.
frontend/src/components/InvoiceForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating invoices with customer selection (including new customer creation), recipe line items with bowl sizes, discount/tax calculations, payment mode selection, and subscription-based pricing integration.
frontend/src/components/InvoiceList.tsx: Displays a filterable list of sales invoices with search, payment mode filter, and customer type filter (subscription vs regular), showing invoice details like customer name, date, payment mode badges, and total amount with click-to-view details functionality.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component providing authentication-gated navigation with a sticky header, mobile-responsive menu, notification bell with unread count, and navigation links to all major app sections (Dashboard, Inventory, Menu, Sales, Subscriptions, Customers).
frontend/src/components/NotificationPane: A popover component displaying notifications (low-stock alerts and subscription reminders) with mark-as-read and dismiss functionality, showing notification type icons, timestamps, and unread count badge.
frontend/src/components/RecipeForm.tsx: Form component for creating and editing recipes with name, bowl size selection (small/medium/large), and dynamic ingredient list with quantities in grams, supporting add/remove ingredient fields.
frontend/src/components/RecipeList.tsx: Grid display of recipe cards showing recipe name, bowl size badge, ingredient list with quantities, and edit button for each recipe.
frontend/src/components/RevenueChart.tsx: React component that displays a bar chart of revenue trends with toggleable 7-day or 30-day periods, using sales analytics data and showing tooltips on hover.
frontend/src/components/SalesAnalyticsCa: Dashboard component displaying sales analytics cards including daily/monthly revenue, customer counts, repeat customer percentages, and top-selling items with revenue details.
frontend/src/components/SubscriptionForm: Form component for creating or editing subscriptions with fields for customer selection, plan type, dates, bowl size, price, and payment status, using react-hook-form for validation.
frontend/src/components/SubscriptionList: Displays a grid of subscription cards showing customer details, plan information, payment status badges, and actions for editing or deleting subscriptions with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: React context provider managing authentication state using Internet Identity, handling login/logout, session management, and persisting session IDs to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing AuthClient creation, login flow, identity storage, and exposing authentication status and methods to components.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Custom React hook that aggregates low-stock ingredients and expiring subscriptions into a unified notification system with localStorage persistence, supporting read/unread status and dismissal.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on ingredients, recipes, customers, subscriptions, and invoices, integrating with the backend actor and authentication context.
frontend/src/hooks/useSalesAnalytics.ts: Computes sales analytics including daily/monthly revenue, trends, top-selling items, customer metrics, payment distribution, and subscription vs. regular revenue from invoice data.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components using oklch color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CustomersPage.tsx: Customer management page displaying total and active customer counts with a list view and dialog for adding/editing customers.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Main dashboard displaying inventory state, sales analytics, low-stock alerts, and expiring subscription warnings with navigation to relevant pages.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page displaying ingredient statistics (total count, inventory value), ingredient list with edit functionality, adjustment history tab, and CSV export capability.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication, displaying Salad Khatora branding and redirecting authenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Menu management page for viewing, adding, and editing recipes with a dialog-based form interface.
frontend/src/pages/SalesPage.tsx: Sales and billing page displaying analytics cards, revenue chart, invoice list, and a dialog for creating new invoices with loading states for all required data.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionsPage.tsx: Subscription management page showing total, active, and expiring subscriptions with add/edit functionality through a dialog form.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility function to export array data to CSV format with proper escaping and automatic filename generation including current date.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended theme settings, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for Salad Khatora system, listing existing features for invoice management, customer handling, recipe-based inventory, and known issues with the /sales route.
